matchRule: normalized case-insensitive display name + normalized 10-digit phone number
mainRecordSchema: identity/contact/demographic fields only, merged without replacing existing non-empty fields

subcollectionSchemas.imports: clinics/kid/patients/{patientId}/imports/{importId}: raw source row and import metadata
subcollectionSchemas.vitals: clinics/kid/patients/{patientId}/vitals/{importId}: { id, patientId, type, source, recordedAt, metrics }
subcollectionSchemas.growth: clinics/kid/patients/{patientId}/growth/{importId}: { id, patientId, type, source, recordedAt, metrics }
